<explanation>
The target image shows a flower with a central cone-like structure surrounded by spiky, thin, purple-tinted bracts. This visual pattern matches the examples for class 34, which feature similar spiky, thistle-like purple flowers. </explanation>

<response>34</response>

<explanation>
The target image shows a large, single flower with several broad, flat petals and a prominent central cluster of stamens. This visual pattern matches the examples for class 81 (Clematis), which feature large, flat petals and a distinct central structure, whereas class 34 has spiky, thistle-like textures, class 88 has orange petals with different leaf shapes, and class 71 has different petal shapes and coloring.
</explanation>

<response>81</response>
